item.title: Introducing GPT-5.5: improved reasoning across domains
item.description: Today we're releasing GPT-5.5. Read the technical report at arXiv:2604.55512 for benchmark details.
item.dc:creator: OpenAI Research

item.title: Safety update: April 2026
item.description: Quarterly safety update on red-teaming, eval suites, and policy actions.

item.title: Old post that should be filtered out
item.description: Should not appear because it's older than 30 days.
